sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) fellowship, association, Hos 6:9. Pro 21:9, בֶּית חֶבֶר “a house in common;” Pro 25:24.

(2) an incantation, a charm, Deu 18:11. Pl. חֲבָרִים Isa 47:9, 12 Isa 47:12.

(3) [Heber], pr.n. of several men-(a) Gen 46:17, for which there is חֵבֶר Num 26:45.-(b) Jud. 4:11 , 17 Jdg 4:17.-(c) 1Ch 8:17.-(d) 1Ch 4:18.
